location_description: Utility room behind cafeteria kitchen — yellow valve handle on main pipe
shutoff_instructions: Turn yellow handle 90 degrees clockwise. Requires wrench (hanging on hook next to valve).

location_description: Electrical panel room — east end of F1 hallway gray metal door
shutoff_instructions: Main breaker is top-left switch (red handle). Flip DOWN to kill power to east wing.
key_location: Key on custodian Frank keyring or in main office lockbox

location_description: Electrical panel — west end of F1 hallway behind janitor closet
shutoff_instructions: Main breaker is top-left switch. Flip DOWN to kill power to west wing.
key_location: Key on custodian Frank keyring or in main office lockbox

location_description: Water main shutoff — outside north side of building green cover in ground
shutoff_instructions: Lift green cover turn valve clockwise with water key (in custodian closet).

location_description: Sprinkler control — utility room behind cafeteria
shutoff_instructions: Do NOT shut off unless fire department instructs. Red wheel valve.
